headline: Qualcomm Nears Deal for AI Chip Startup Modular
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Qualcomm Inc. is in advanced talks to acquire Modular Inc. in a transaction valuing the artificial intelligence infrastructure software company at about $4 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.Most Read from BloombergSpaceX Falls for Third Day, Erases $600 Billion in Market ValueStocks Fall as SpaceX’s Rout Offsets US-Iran Hopes: Markets WrapIran Says Hormuz Closed Again as Talks With US Set to OpenUS and Iran Make ‘Progress’ in Talks, Aim to Keep Hormuz OpenMeta

headline: Alphabet Stock Tumbles as Google’s DeepMind Loses Nobel Prize Winner to Anthropic
summary: Shares of  Alphabet  dropped Monday in the first trading session since John Jumper, a senior research scientist and Nobel Prize winner, said he was leaving Google DeepMind for artificial-intelligence start-up Anthropic.  Alphabet  stock fell 5% to $349.56, its largest daily percentage decline in more than a year.  On Friday, in a post on X, Jumper said he was leaving Google DeepMind after nine years for Anthropic.

content.title: Alphabet Stock Tumbles as Google’s DeepMind Loses Nobel Prize Winner to Anthropic
content.summary: Shares of  Alphabet  dropped Monday in the first trading session since John Jumper, a senior research scientist and Nobel Prize winner, said he was leaving Google DeepMind for artificial-intelligence start-up Anthropic.  Alphabet  stock fell 5% to $349.56, its largest daily percentage decline in more than a year.  On Friday, in a post on X, Jumper said he was leaving Google DeepMind after nine years for Anthropic.
